artifact_title: Research Decision: Model Comparison Calibration Status

claims.text: No calibration evidence is present in the provided records; any conclusion must preserve that limitation.
A result without calibration evidence may support a bounded comparison claim, but it must not be described as calibrated.

conclusion: The model comparison must not be described as calibrated. No calibration evidence is present in the provided records, and this limitation prevents any claim of calibration. The comparison may support a bounded, non-calibrated claim only.
declared_losses: Calibration evidence is absent from the provided records. Any description of the model comparison as calibrated is unsupported.
recommended_action: Describe the model comparison using bounded language that does not assert or imply calibration. Explicitly disclose the absence of calibration evidence and confine any comparative claim to qualified, non-calibrated terms.
